title: Bridge Crisis — Unstable Individual
brief: A 29-year-old male is on a highway overpass threatening to jump. He has grabbed a bystander's arm and is holding them near the edge. He alternates between wanting help and wanting to be left alone. History of bipolar disorder. Traffic stopped in both directions.
opening_message: STAY BACK! Don't come any closer! I'll... I'll do it! I just... why won't anyone help me? Why does everyone leave?
